channel.title: MacReiben Web Zone
channel.description: Recent content on MacReiben Web Zone

item.title: Green addict
item.description:
I use tests frameworks all the time. Whether I do TDD or try a code sample. It’s the faster way isn’t it ?

I become a “green addict”. I feel unconfortable when I’m not seeing green patches on my test runner - or when I do not see red patches when I change code (which frightens me much more).

item.title: DDD Europe 2018
item.description:
I was at the DDD Europe conference this year. I’m very interested in design oriented conference.

I have the feeling that the conference was not really about design, but about changing minds, point of view and improve ones understanding.

item.title: About Me
item.description: I’m a software developper since I graduated from Supinfo in 2007. At the time I coded in Java using Struts MVC with Hibernate. That was Firefox 1.4 era and the beginning of JQuery ^^. I did learn my job on a J2EE project. So placing the code at the correct place mattered since the beginning of my career. Then I moved to ASP.Net MVC around 2010, then Silverlight where I met the MVVM pattern.

item.title: MSBuild: Copier un dossier avec wildcards
item.description:
This is a little trick to copy files from a regular expression with MSBuild.

With this example it becomes possible to use wildcards to identity to elements to copy.
